untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'multiple tests of volatility band within short timeframe' and 'failed breakout attempt' — neither can be expressed with single-bar logic using allowed indicators and operators. These require multi-bar pattern recognition (counting touches, detecting reversals after N consecutive tests) which is beyond the scope of 3-field condition rules.
translation_notes: Approximated core logic: reversal bar with substantial range and above-average volume after testing band extreme. Used range > prev_range as proxy for 'substantial reversal bar'. Cannot capture the essential 'multiple tests' and 'pattern exhaustion' components without multi-bar lookback or custom pattern functions.
